view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for auto-deleting links 24 hours after the scheduled meeting is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for auto-deleting links 24 hours after the scheduled meeting is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the system generates a temporary link for a one-off meeting, which automatically expires after the meeting completes. This is explicitly stated in the linked use case, where it mentions that the system generates a temporary link that expires 24 hours after the scheduled meeting. The evidence from the use case directly supports the requirement, demonstrating that the functionality is implemented as expected.
